kinesisanalyticsv2.application.zeppelinm: Describes configuration parameters for Amazon CloudWatch logging for a Kinesis Data Analytics Studio notebook. For more information about CloudWatch logging, see [Monitoring](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/kinesisanalytics/latest/java/monitoring-overview.html).

kinesisanalyticsv2.application.zeppelinm.Description: The verbosity of the CloudWatch Logs for an application. You can set it to `INFO`, `WARN`, `ERROR`, or `DEBUG`.
